description: Example user brief that triggers the lynai-report skill. The Orchestrator would parse this and emit plan.json. Modelled on Xuan-Ce's prior PLS v2.0 work.

brief.subject: Pilbara Minerals (ASX: PLS)
brief.additional_context: Focus on whether the recent price recovery is structural or cyclical. House view from prior research is that the supply curve has materially shifted — please test this against the latest cost data. We need a clear base/bull/bear with quantified scenarios. The IC will be most interested in invalidation criteria.
